overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a snowy mountain forest at night. The scene is illuminated by bright moonlight, featuring dense coniferous trees, rocky terrain, and distant snow-capped peaks visible through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain forest trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the snow-covered forest path, moving away from a large rock formation

entered.detail: massive boulder formation covered in snow, towering over the left side of the trail
dense cluster of evergreen trees forming the forest wall
dense cluster of evergreen trees forming the forest wall
bright full moon illuminating the scene from behind the trees
large snow-covered mountain peak visible through the tree canopy
narrow winding path covered in snow, showing footprints and tire tracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered forest trail at night, passing a large rock outcrop on the left. Bright moonlight filters through the tall pine trees, illuminating the path ahead and revealing distant snow-capped mountains through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest with winding trail and fallen timber

events.description: path enters denser tree cover, reducing direct moonlight and creating deeper shadows on the trail

agents.ego_description: character continues walking as the trail curves slightly right through denser woodland, navigating around natural obstacles

entered.detail: large fallen pine tree lying beside the path, partially covered in snow
scattered boulders and rocky outcrops emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the forest where the canopy thickens, blocking much of the moonlight and creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The large rock formation falls behind as the path winds through denser timber, with fallen trees and rocky terrain appearing along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit snowy forest that gradually transitions from an open, luminous trail into a dense and shadowed woodland. It begins by following a character along a snow-covered path, passing a large rock outcrop while bright moonlight filters through tall pines to reveal distant snow-capped mountains. As the character proceeds deeper into the forest, the canopy thickens and begins to block the moonlight, shifting the atmosphere from bright and open to dark and enclosed. The scene then winds through denser timber, leaving the initial rock formation behind as the terrain becomes more rugged with fallen trees and rocky outcrops lining the trail.
